f-1.i20: Your SEVP-approved school issues Form I-20 after confirming your acceptance and that you meet financial requirements for the program.
f-1.sevis_fee: Pay the $350 SEVIS I-901 fee online at fmjfee.gov using the SEVIS ID from your I-20 before your visa interview.
f-1.ds160: Complete the online DS-160 nonimmigrant visa application at ceac.state.gov and print the confirmation page for your interview.
f-1.schedule_interview: Schedule your visa interview at the US embassy or consulate with jurisdiction over your area; wait times vary by location and season.
f-1.financial_docs: Gather bank statements, scholarship letters, or sponsor letters showing you can cover tuition and living expenses.
f-1.attend_interview: Bring your passport, I-20, DS-160 confirmation, and financial documents to your scheduled interview at the embassy or consulate.
f-1.visa_issued: Once your visa is approved and issued in your passport, you're ready to travel and begin your program in the US.

j-1.ds2019: Your exchange program sponsor issues Form DS-2019 confirming your acceptance and program details once you're selected.
j-1.sevis_fee: Pay the $350 SEVIS I-901 fee online at fmjfee.gov using the SEVIS ID from your DS-2019 before your visa interview.
j-1.ds160: Complete the online DS-160 nonimmigrant visa application at ceac.state.gov and print the confirmation page for your interview.
j-1.schedule_interview: Schedule your visa interview at the US embassy or consulate with jurisdiction over your area; wait times vary by location and season.
j-1.financial_docs: Gather proof of funding from your program sponsor, or personal and family financial resources, showing you can cover program costs.
j-1.attend_interview: Bring your passport, DS-2019, DS-160 confirmation, and financial documents to your scheduled interview at the embassy or consulate.
j-1.visa_issued: Once your J-1 visa is approved and issued, you're ready to travel and begin your exchange program.

m-1.i20: Your SEVP-approved vocational school issues Form I-20 after confirming your acceptance and that you meet financial requirements.
m-1.sevis_fee: Pay the $350 SEVIS I-901 fee online at fmjfee.gov using the SEVIS ID from your I-20 before your visa interview.
m-1.ds160: Complete the online DS-160 nonimmigrant visa application at ceac.state.gov and print the confirmation page for your interview.
m-1.schedule_interview: Schedule your visa interview at the US embassy or consulate with jurisdiction over your area; wait times vary by location and season.
m-1.financial_docs: Gather bank statements or a sponsor affidavit showing you can cover the full cost of your vocational program, not just the first year.
m-1.attend_interview: Bring your passport, I-20, DS-160 confirmation, and financial documents to your scheduled interview at the embassy or consulate.
m-1.visa_issued: Once your M-1 visa is approved and issued, you're ready to travel and begin your vocational program.
